stabilized_changes: Added run_stable_pipeline.py as the primary stable execution entrypoint
Added run_system_health_check.py for local health validation without Telegram dependency
Changed scheduler health default profile to stable Step1~157E outputs
Made operational dry-run write failure details instead of crashing on traceback
Made Extended jsonl append helper tolerant of Windows read-only/locked log files
Kept legacy runners and old modules preserved but not recommended as main entrypoints
